Race Fees
🎟️
It's $6.70!
Please send $6.70 to dragonboat2526@gmail.com on Zelle by Saturday, April 25th, 11:59 pm.
This amount is to help cover race fees, gas to reimburse our drivers, and race-day meals! Feel free to contact our treasurer, Caleb, if you have any questions or concerns.
